summary: Completed testing of Document Folder Categories and Direct Upload features for Fiscal Tax Canarie. Backend: All 9 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified - 'Carica Documento' button, 'Nuova Categoria' button, upload dialog, category dialog, and document preview all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: X-Frame-Options 'deny' prevents PDF preview in iframe - this is expected security behavior, fallback to download works

critical_code_review_comments: DocumentPreview.jsx: Well-structured with proper error handling, timeout management, fullscreen toggle, and fallback for non-previewable files
DocumentFolderBrowser.jsx: Correctly implements isAdmin check for showing 'Carica Documento' and 'Nuova Categoria' buttons
Backend API: Client-specific folder categories correctly stored in separate collection (client_folder_categories) from global categories
Direct upload endpoint properly validates file, sanitizes filename, and stores in both MongoDB and B2 cloud storage
seed_data_creation: Used existing test client 'Test Commercialista User' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document folder categories and direct upload features fully tested. APIs working: GET /api/folder-categories, GET/POST/DELETE /api/clients/{client_id}/folder-categories, POST /api/clients/{client_id}/documents/upload. Frontend shows 'Carica Documento' and 'Nuova Categoria' buttons for admin users in DocumentFolderBrowser. Document preview opens correctly with PDF/image support.

backend_api.POST /api/clients/{client_id}/folder-cat: ✓ Creates client-specific category with correct structure
backend_api.POST /api/clients/{client_id}/documents/: ✓ Uploads document directly to client folder with category and year

frontend_client.Clienti Navigation: ✓ Navigate to client list and select client
frontend_client.Carica Documento Button: ✓ Visible for admin, opens upload dialog
frontend_client.Nuova Categoria Button: ✓ Visible for admin, opens category creation dialog
frontend_client.Upload Dialog: ✓ Opens with file input, category select, year input
frontend_client.Category Dialog: ✓ Opens with name input, color picker, client-specific checkbox
frontend_client.Folder Structure: ✓ Shows all default categories (Documenti, Agencia Tributaria, Seguridad Social, etc.)
